description_long: This is a triangular traffic warning sign mounted on a slender, cylindrical post. The sign face is white with a bold black exclamation mark centered inside, bordered by a thick red outline, indicating a general caution or warning. The post appears metallic and is capped at both ends with slightly wider, textured tips for stability and installation. The rear of the sign is plain and unmarked, showing only the metallic backing and the post. The sign is designed to be highly visible to approaching pedestrians and drivers, with its bright colors and clear symbol. Its construction suggests durability for outdoor urban environments, such as streets or intersections.
description: A triangular warning traffic sign with a red border and exclamation mark, mounted on a metallic post. Designed for high visibility and outdoor durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white triangular sign with a red border and black exclamation mark, mounted on a metallic post.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical post, with the sign face barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain metallic back of the triangular sign and the post, with no markings or symbols.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical post.
